fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified settings applied.

params.args: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" /> specifying variation, palette, and collection settings.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface based on the current typeface with the specified font arguments applied.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> configured to use the specified palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface based on the current typeface using the specified color palette index.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified variation design position applied.

params.position: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying axis positions.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface based on the current typeface with the specified variation design position.

fields.value: A valid, non-null <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> that represents an empty typeface.

fields.returns: The number of axes written to <paramref name="axes" />.

params.axes: The span to fill with <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> information.

fields.summary: Fills a span with information about the variation axes of the typeface.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to <paramref name="coordinates" />.

params.coordinates: The span to fill with <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values.

fields.summary: Fills a span with the current variation design position of the typeface.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the typeface has no glyphs (glyph count is zero); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface has no glyphs.

fields.value: The number of variation axes defined in the font.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design parameter axes in the typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> describing each variation axis.
fields.summary: Gets the variation design parameter axes for the typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> representing the current axis positions.
fields.summary: Gets the current variation design position of the typeface.

fields.value: The number of variation axis coordinates in the current design position.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design position coordinates for the typeface.
